text: - #2809 ADR-0075 amendment: diagnostic surface is not app surface — propose nmp-devtools — the core proposal for the X-Ray/devtools diagnostic surface; open, `status:needs-adr` [...] **NMP#2809** — OPEN. Labels: priority:p2, category:decision, status:needs-adr, area:architecture. Proposes amending ADR-0075 to split "app surface" (unchanged: no Trellis vocabulary crosses UniFFI/web) from a new "diagnostic surface": a dev-build-only `nmp-devtools` crate exposing Trellis trace/audit data via an MCP server (`why_subscription_open`, `why_view_stale`, `what_closed_this_relay`, `list_scope_inventory`, `replay_session`) plus redacted trace export for bug reports. Explicitly excludes metrics/dashboards/log aggregation — receipts only. Names four upstream trellis prerequisites: #114 (serializable traces), #125 (audit retention toggle), #122 (typed resource keys), #126 (scope reclamation) — **all four now closed**. Sequenced after NMP #2808 (shadow→authority promotion), which is also now closed/merged (PR #2832, "Promote Trellis feed-session reconciliation to authority," merged today, 2026-07-03). Every stated prerequisite is done; #2809 is unblocked, just needs the ADR decision. No comments. [...] **chirp#30** — OPEN. Labels: enhancement. Proposes an "X-Ray Feed" developer overlay showing live relay-subscription reconciliation with causal chains, staged in three phases: v0 "Shadow X-Ray" (buildable now, visualizes NMP's discarded shadow ResourcePlan next to legacy behavior — now stale since #2808 already promoted shadow to authority), v1 "Authority X-Ray" (real applied commands with causal chains, gated on #2808 — now closed/done), v2 "Time travel" (record + scrub a session trace, gated on trellis#114 — now closed/done — and NMP#2809). Explicitly out of scope: metrics/dashboards/log views, receipts only. No comments. [...] **The big finding that reshapes the plan:** every single upstream prerequisite is already closed. Trellis #114 (serializable traces, via PR #141), #122 (typed keys), #125 (bounded audit retention), #126 (scope reclamation) — all done. And NMP #2808 (shadow → authority promotion) merged *today* via PR #2832. Two consequences:
